RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. Plaintiff HONORWAY INVESTMENT CORPORATION'S Motion to Compel Discovery is granted. The motion was unopposed. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: James Watson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
